title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin's AI Dark Factory uses multi-model orchestration, combining Claude Opus for complex reasoning and planning with Kimi K2.6 for faster execution tasks. The approach improves token efficiency by routing deep reasoning only where needed while delegating implementation and validation to faster, cheaper models.
